# html-deck-layout — Mobile PPT Generator Generate mobile-optimized HTML presentations (1920×1080 landscape) for phone-screen viewing: 投屏、录屏、口播视频配图。All slides enforce **fill-deck** (zero wasted space), **≥42px body text**, **≥85% coverage**. ## When to use | 走这个 skill | 走 html-ppt | |-------------|-------------| | 手机横屏播放（投屏/录屏） | 桌面演示（键盘翻页） | | 口播视频配幻灯 | 线下演讲 / 会议分享 | | 1920×1080 固定视口 | 响应式/全屏自适应 | | 需要 fill-deck 防空白 | 需要 runtime.js 键盘导航 | **不确定时**：如果最终在手机上看 → html-deck-layout；如果在电脑/投影上看 → html-ppt。 ## Before you author anything — ALWAYS ask **Do not start writing slides until you confirm three things.** Either ask the user directly, or — if they already provided rich content — propose a default and confirm. 1. **Content & audience.** 什么主题？大概多少页？观众是谁（内部/公开/学员）？ 2. **Style / theme.** 推荐风格： - 技术分享 → `mobile-tech`（深蓝科技，默认最安全） - 亲和/生活 → `mobile-warm`（暖橙） - 正式汇报 → `mobile-minimal`（白底极简）或 `mobile-data`（数据蓝） - 赛博/活动 → `mobile-dark`（OLED 黑） - 文化/教育 → `mobile-nature`（自然绿） 3. **Starting point.** 用哪个 full-deck 模板打底？ - 通用 → `mobile-generic` - 技术分享 → `mobile-tech-sharing` - 产品发布 → `mobile-product-pitch` - 课程介绍 → `mobile-course-intro` A good opening message: > 我来给你做这份手机横屏 PPT！先确认三件事： > 1. 主题 / 大概页数 / 观众？ > 2. 风格偏好？建议：`mobile-tech`（技术分享默认）、`mobile-warm`（生活类）、`mobile-data`（数据报告） > 3. 用 `mobile-generic` 全 deck 模板打底，还是从单页 layout 组装？ ## Generation workflow (MANDATORY) **You MUST follow these 6 steps in order. Do not skip any step.** ### Step 1: Confirm requirements 向用户确认：主题 / 页数 / 观众 / 风格 / 起始模板。 ✓ Gate: 用户明确回复后才能继续。 ### Step 2: Pick theme & read quality baseline 1. 选择主题 CSS（见下方 Theme 选择）。 2. **⚠️ You MUST read `examples/demo-deck/index.html` as the visual quality baseline. Your output MUST match or exceed its richness — inline SVG diagrams, card-diagram sections, varied layouts.** ✓ Gate: 已读取 demo-deck，了解 SVG 架构图、流程图、监控图等写法。 ### Step 3: Plan outline with layout mapping 将内容拆页，每页分配布局（参考下方「7 种布局速查」）： | 页码 | 内容 | 布局 | 有无 SVG 图？ | |------|------|------|-------------| | 1 | 封面 | Cover | — | | 2 | ... | Grid 2×2 / Split / ... | 简述图内容 | | N | 致谢 | Thanks | — | **Each deck MUST include ≥2 SVG diagrams** (using `
` with inline `
` sections. | | Distinct layout types per deck | **≥ 3** | Cover + Thanks don't count toward the 3. | | Pages with `card-diagram` | **≥ 2** | Architecture, flow, stats — something visual. | | Consecutive same-layout pages | **≤ 2** | Then you must switch to a different layout. | | Body text | **≥ 42px** | Phone readability hard floor. | | Card title | **≥ 52px** | Phone readability hard floor. | | Coverage (visual fill) | **≥ 85%** | fill-deck prevents whitespace. | | Characters per page | **≤ 120 汉字** | Slide = skeleton, detail via voiceover. | ## Mobile constraints (summary) | Constraint | Value | Source | |-----------|-------|--------| | Canvas | 1920×1080 | Fixed viewport | | Body text | **≥42px** | Hard minimum | | Card title | **≥52px** | Tier table | | Coverage | **≥85%** | Visual estimate | | Chars/page | **≤120 汉字** | Slide = skeleton, detail via voiceover | | Info blocks/page | **≤3** | Title + cards count | | Layout variety | **≥2–3 types/deck** | No 3+ same in a row | | SVG text (viewBox) | **≥24px**（标注），**≥28px**（关键文字） | In viewBox coordinates; 18px on phone is unreadable | ## 7 layouts — quick reference | 布局 | 关键 CSS | 适用页 | 结构 | |------|----------|--------|------| | **Cover** | `.v-center`, `.emoji-xl` | 封面、章节首页 | v-center + hero | | **Grid 2×2** | `.fill-deck`, `.grid-2x2` | 功能总览、模块对比 | fill-deck + 4 卡网格 | | **Split 50/50** | `.fill-deck`, `.split` | 对比、前后端、优劣 | fill-deck + 左右对半 | | **Card + Diagram** | `.fill-deck`, `.card-diagram` | 架构图、流程图、数据流 | fill-deck + 顶卡 + 全宽图 | | **Stat Highlight** | `.stat-value`, `.stat-label` | 数据展示、里程碑 | fill-deck + 大数字卡 | | **Process Flow** | `.process-flow` | 发布流程、决策链、时间线 | fill-deck + 横向步骤 | | **Thanks** | `.v-center` | 收口、致谢、结尾 | v-center + 居中文字 | 布局选择速查： ``` 封面 .............. Cover 功能/模块总览 ..... Grid 2×2 A vs B 对比 ....... Split 50/50 架构/流程图 ....... Card + Diagram ← 必用！至少 2 页 关键数字 .......... Stat Highlight 步骤/流程 ......... Process Flow 结尾 .............. Thanks ``` ## SVG 图标速查 (内联) 所有图标 `viewBox="0 0 24 24"`，通过 `width/height` 或 CSS 缩放，`stroke="currentColor"` 继承父元素颜色。 ### 常用图标 **箭头右** (流程指向)： ```svg ``` **网格（四格）** (模块化)： ```svg ``` **层叠（堆栈）** (微服务/架构)： ```svg ``` **折线图** (数据趋势)： ```svg ``` **柱状图** (数据对比)： ```svg ``` **数据库** (存储层)： ```svg ``` **勾选/成功** (状态)： ```svg ``` **警告** (风险)： ```svg ``` **盾牌** (安全)： ```svg ``` **闪电** (触发/实时)： ```svg ``` **用户组** (团队/角色)： ```svg ``` **锁定** (权限)： ```svg ``` **链接** (互联)： ```svg ``` **灯泡** (想法)： ```svg ``` **代码** (开发)： ```svg ``` ## SVG 架构图模板 这些是生成 `card-diagram` 区块的核心模板。⚠️ 每份 deck 至少使用 2 个。 ### 横向流水线（4 层架构） 参考 demo-deck Slide 4 的 Gateway→Service→Cache→DB 写法。核心模式： ```html
``` ### 折线图 / 监控曲线 参考 demo-deck Slide 2 第 4 卡的监控图写法： ```html ``` ### Hub-Spoke 图（中心辐射） 参考 demo-deck Slide 2 第 3 卡： ```html ``` ### 树形 / 层级图 ```html ``` ## Theme 选择 在 `` 中引入对应 CSS 即可切换： ```html ``` | 主题 | 文件 | 背景色 | 场景 | |------|------|--------|------| | **mobile-tech** | mobile-tech.css | 深蓝 #0f172a | 技术分享、工程内训（默认） | | **mobile-warm** | mobile-warm.css | 暖黄 #fffbeb | 亲和介绍、生活类、小红书 | | **mobile-minimal** | mobile-minimal.css | 白色 #ffffff | 正式汇报、学术报告 | | **mobile-dark** | mobile-dark.css | 纯黑 #000000 | OLED 设备、赛博风 | | **mobile-data** | mobile-data.css | 浅蓝 #eff6ff | 数据报告、季度汇报 | | **mobile-nature** | mobile-nature.css | 浅绿 #f0fdf4 | 文化内容、主题教育 | ## Quick start 1. **Copy a full-deck template** (不是最小的 deck.html！). ``` cp -r templates/full-decks/mobile-generic examples/my-talk ``` 2. **Pick a theme.** Change the CSS link in ``. 3. **Replace content.** Edit text, emoji, and SVG in each slide. 4. **Swap layouts.** Copy `
...
` blocks from `templates/single-page/` as needed. 5. **Add diagrams.** Use SVG from above or [references/svg-snippets.md](references/svg-snippets.md). 6. **Self-check.** Verify all constraints in the Visual richness rules table. ## Optional references (for advanced use) These files provide deeper detail when needed but are NOT required for basic generation: - [references/spec-cheatsheet.md](references/spec-cheatsheet.md) — full layout spec (fill-deck, font tiers, CSS code) - [references/mobile-themes.md](references/mobile-themes.md) — 6 themes detailed catalog - [references/svg-snippets.md](references/svg-snippets.md) — complete SVG icon library (50+ icons) - [references/emoji-guide.md](references/emoji-guide.md) — emoji quick reference by scenario - [references/authoring-guide.md](references/authoring-guide.md) — detailed 6-step authoring workflow ## Relationship with other skills ### html-video-from-slides | This skill | html-video-from-slides | |-----------|----------------------| | **Generate** slides (prompt → HTML) | **Render** video (HTML + audio → MP4) | | Layout rules & templates | CLI pipeline (`node cli.js`) | | Standalone output | Adds `.wa` anchors, Whisper timing | Workflow: use this skill to create slides → then use html-video-from-slides to produce video. Layout spec is shared: [references/spec-cheatsheet.md](references/spec-cheatsheet.md). ### srt-to-deck | This skill | srt-to-deck | |-----------|------------| | **Generate** slides (prompt → HTML) | **Generate** slides (SRT → HTML) | | Layout rules & templates | **Reuses** this skill's layout rules & templates | | Input: user prompt | Input: Whisper SRT file | `srt-to-deck` is a sibling skill that shares this skill's entire visual system (themes, layouts, SVG, fill-deck rules). It adds SRT parsing + topic segmentation + automatic layout matching on top. The output is the same format (presentation.html with `go(n)`) and is compatible with html-video-from-slides. ## 产出物路径 遵循 `features/_template/content-production/` 标准布局： | 产出物 | 写入路径 | |--------|----------| | `presentation.html` | `/production/slides/presentation.html` | ## File structure ``` html-deck-layout/ ├── SKILL.md (this file) ├── references/ (detailed catalogs & spec) │ ├── spec-cheatsheet.md (layout rules, CSS code, self-check) │ ├── authoring-guide.md (6-step authoring workflow) │ ├── mobile-themes.md (6 themes catalog) │ ├── mobile-layouts.md (7 layouts catalog) │ ├── svg-snippets.md (SVG icon library) │ └── emoji-guide.md (emoji quick reference) ├── assets/ │ ├── base.css (mobile-first design tokens) │ ├── fonts.css (font stack) │ ├── mobile-layout.css (fill-deck, #P, slide structure) │ └── themes/ (6 theme CSS overrides) │ ├── mobile-tech.css │ ├── mobile-warm.css │ ├── mobile-minimal.css │ ├── mobile-dark.css │ ├── mobile-data.css │ └── mobile-nature.css ├── templates/ │ ├── deck.html (minimal 3-slide starter — NOT recommended as starting point) │ ├── full-decks/ (4 complete deck templates — USE THESE) │ │ ├── mobile-generic/ │ │ ├── mobile-tech-sharing/ │ │ ├── mobile-product-pitch/ │ │ └── mobile-course-intro/ │ └── single-page/ (7 layout templates) │ ├── cover.html │ ├── grid-2x2.html │ ├── split-50-50.html │ ├── card-plus-diagram.html │ ├── stat-highlight.html │ ├── process-flow.html │ └── thanks.html └── examples/ └── demo-deck/ ← ⚠️ READ THIS before generating! ```
